title: Device Home Screen - Disconnected device
scenario: Device Home Screen UI shows "Not Connected" status with greyed-out elements when paired headset is disconnected
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to the Device Home screen (Home → [Device Name]).
4. Turn off the headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button until the LED turns off).
5. Observe the Device Home screen UI.
expected: The Device Home Screen displays: the device name (with an "i" icon if applicable), a crossed red dot with "Not Connected" label, a greyed-out device image, a "..." button, greyed-out battery icons, and the firmware version "X.Y.Z".
